title: Implement Responsive Data Table
description: Build a data table that works across screen sizes with sorting, filtering, and pagination.
steps: Define column config: header, accessor, sortable, width, responsive breakpoint
Implement sort state: column + direction, toggle on header click
Add filter inputs: text search, dropdown selects, date range
Implement pagination: page controls, page size selector, total count
Responsive: hide non-essential columns on mobile, show in expandable row
Add keyboard navigation: arrow keys between cells, Enter to edit
Export: CSV download button for current filtered/sorted data
